title: Tucker Carlson says CIA accessed his messages, tried to frame him as foreign agent
summary_full: Tucker Carlson alleges the CIA is recommending the Justice Department charge him as an unregistered foreign agent for Iran, claiming they read his texts. He insists his communications were journalistic and denies acting against US interests. Carlson suggests the probe is politically motivated due to his views on Israel and the war.
